title: KRIBHCO – Graduate Engineer Trainee
shortInfo: Krishak Bharati Cooperative (KRIBHCO) has released Graduate Engineer Trainee Recruitment 2026 vacancies. Eligible candidates with B.Tech/B.E. can apply online through the official KRIBHCO website. The online application process, originally scheduled to close on 21-05-2026, has now been extended till 31-05-2026. Candidates are advised to complete their registration before the revised deadline.

basic_details.job_title: KRIBHCO Graduate Engineer Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Krishak Bharati Cooperative (KRIBHCO) has released Graduate Engineer Trainee Recruitment 2026 vacancies. Eligible candidates with B.Tech/B.E. can apply online through the official KRIBHCO website. The online application process, originally scheduled to close on 21-05-2026, has now been extended till 31-05-2026. Candidates are advised to complete their registration before the revised deadline.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KRIBHCO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: Krishak Bharati Cooperative Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) Chemical/Mechanical/Electrical/Instrumentation/Computer Recruitment 2026
